chapters.title: 标　语
chapters.content:
二○○五年夏季训练（第一组）
我们需要看见这异象：召会是在父神里，有祂的生命和性情，并且在主耶稣基督里，有祂一切的所是和所作。
We need to see a vision of the church in God the Father with His life and nature and in the Lord Jesus Christ with all He is and has done.
信心是工作的性质和力量，爱心是劳苦的动机和特征，盼望是忍耐的源头，三者乃是为着召会生活之圣别生活的结构。
Faith as the nature and strength of the work, love as the motivation for and characteristic of labor, and hope as the source of endurance are the structure of a holy life for the church life.
行事为人配得过那召我们进入祂的国和荣耀的神，就是在我们日常生活中照着调和的灵而行，以活神并彰显神。
To walk in a manner worthy of God, who calls us into His kingdom and glory, is to live God and express God in our daily living by walking according to the mingled spirit.
我们要为着召会生活过圣别的生活，就必须与神的运行合作，使我们的心得坚固，在圣别上无可指摘，并使我们全然圣别，灵、魂、体蒙保守得以完全。
In order to live a holy life for the church life, we need to cooperate with God’s operation to establish our heart blameless in holiness and to sanctify us wholly, with our spirit, soul, and body preserved complete.
二○○五年夏季训练（第二组）
当我们在生命、性情、彰显和功用上，成为与基督一样，我们就够资格为着祂的身体与祂同工。
As we become the same as Christ in life, nature, expression, and function, we are qualified to work with Him for His Body.
当我们无依无靠地信靠主，倚靠祂作我们的爱和力量，并且听祂说话，我们的盼望就是借着身体的得赎而被提，我们的祷告乃是：“主耶稣啊，我愿你来！”
As we trust in the Lord helplessly, depend on Him as our love and strength, and listen to His speaking, our hope is to be raptured through the redemption of our body, and our prayer is—“Come, Lord Jesus!”
